---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Alumni | Sustainability Lab"
description-meta: "Alumni of the Sustainability Lab, IIT Gandhinagar — PhD, Master's and undergraduate researchers now at Cambridge, Microsoft Research, Google DeepMind, CMU, and leading companies worldwide."
toc: false
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
---

<style>
body {
    font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif;
    background-color: #fafbfc;
    color: #1a1a2e;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.hero-banner {
    background: #fafafa;
    color: #1a1a2e;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}

.hero-banner h1 {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    color: #1a1a2e;
}

.hero-banner p {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: #5a6070;
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

.stats-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    margin: 30px 0;
}

.stat-card {
    background: white;
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
    border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}

.stat-number {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #c44536;
    display: block;
}

.stat-label {
    color: #5a6070;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.section-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
    padding: 30px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
}

.section-card h2 {
    color: #c44536;
    font-size: 1.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    border-bottom: 3px solid #c44536;
    padding-bottom: 8px;
}

.section-card h3 {
    color: #1a1a2e;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 25px 0 15px 0;
    border-left: 4px solid #c44536;
    padding-left: 12px;
}

.phd-card {
    background: #f8fafc;
    border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.phd-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    border-color: #c44536;
}

.cropped-image {
    width: 120px;
    height: 120px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.cropped-image:hover {
    border-color: #c44536;
}

.phd-info {
    flex: 1;
}

.phd-name {
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #1a1a2e;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.phd-duration {
    color: #c44536;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.alumni-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 12px;
}

.alumni-item {
    background: #f8fafc;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 4px solid #e5e7eb;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.alumni-item:hover {
    border-left-color: #c44536;
    background: #f1f5f9;
    transform: translateX(4px);
}

.alumni-name {
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #1a1a2e;
}

.alumni-details {
    color: #5a6070;
    margin-top: 4px;
}

/* Consistent styling for all organizations */
.university {
    background: #c44536;
    color: white;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.company {
    background: #5a6070;
    color: white;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.startup {
    background: #5a6070;
    color: white;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-banner h1 {
        font-size: 2rem;
    }
    
    .phd-card {
        flex-direction: column;
        text-align: center;
    }
    
    .cropped-image {
        width: 100px;
        height: 100px;
    }
    
    .stats-row {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
}
</style>

<div class="hero-banner">
<h1>Our Alumni Network</h1>
<p>From IIT Gandhinagar to global impact - meet the changemakers who started their journey in our lab</p>
</div>

<div class="stats-row">
<div class="stat-card">
<span class="stat-number">50+</span>
<span class="stat-label">Alumni Placed</span>
</div>
<div class="stat-card">
<span class="stat-number">15+</span>
<span class="stat-label">Top Universities</span>
</div>
<div class="stat-card">
<span class="stat-number">10+</span>
<span class="stat-label">Leading Companies</span>
</div>
<div class="stat-card">
<span class="stat-number">8+</span>
<span class="stat-label">Years Impact</span>
</div>
</div>

```{=html}
<style>
.placements { max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto 36px; }
.placements h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; color: var(--ink); text-align: center; font-size: 1.9rem; margin: 0 0 6px; border: none; padding: 0; }
.placements .pl-sub { text-align: center; color: var(--muted); font-size: .98rem; margin: 0 auto 22px; max-width: 620px; }
.pl-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 12px; }
.pl-item { background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-top: 2px solid var(--accent); border-radius: var(--radius-medium); padding: 15px 12px; text-align: center; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink); font-size: .92rem; line-height: 1.3; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 58px; }
@media (max-width: 820px) { .pl-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } }
@media (max-width: 520px) { .pl-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .placements h2 { font-size: 1.55rem; } }
</style>
<div class="placements">
<h2>Where Our Alumni Are Now</h2>
<p class="pl-sub">Our graduates go on to top PhD programs, research labs, and companies worldwide.</p>
<div class="pl-grid">
<div class="pl-item">University of Cambridge</div>
<div class="pl-item">Microsoft Research</div>
<div class="pl-item">Google DeepMind</div>
<div class="pl-item">Carnegie Mellon (CMU)</div>
<div class="pl-item">UIUC</div>
<div class="pl-item">Texas A&amp;M</div>
<div class="pl-item">Microsoft</div>
<div class="pl-item">Oracle</div>
<div class="pl-item">Nykaa</div>
<div class="pl-item">Wadhwani AI</div>
<div class="pl-item">Skan.ai</div>
<div class="pl-item">Trading Technologies</div>
</div>
</div>
```

<div class="section-card">
<h2>PhD Graduates</h2>

<div class="phd-card">
<a href="https://patel-zeel.github.io">
<img loading="lazy" src="https://patel-zeel.github.io/images/profile_crop.png" class="cropped-image" alt="Dr. Zeel B Patel">
</a>
<div class="phd-info">
<div class="phd-name">Dr. Zeel B Patel</div>
<div class="phd-duration">January 2020 - February 2026</div>
<div style="color: #5a6070;">Our second PhD graduate! Specialized in Gaussian Processes and Bayesian Machine Learning. Winner of Microsoft Research India PhD Award. Currently Postdoc at <span class="company">Microsoft Research India</span>.</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="phd-card">
<a href="https://rishi-a.github.io">
<img loading="lazy" src="https://rishi-a.github.io/images/RISHIRAJ.jpg" class="cropped-image" alt="Dr. Rishiraj Adhikary">
</a>
<div class="phd-info">
<div class="phd-name">Dr. Rishiraj Adhikary</div>
<div class="phd-duration">July 2019 - January 2025</div>
<div style="color: #5a6070;">Our first PhD graduate! Specialized in health sensing and respiratory monitoring technologies. Winner of multiple prestigious awards including Fulbright-Nehru Fellowship. Now Postdoctoral Researcher at <span class="university">University of Cambridge</span> with Prof. Cecilia Mascolo.</div>
<div style="margin-top: 8px;"><a href="experiences/rishiraj.qmd" style="color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none;">Read Rishiraj's story: Shillong to Cambridge &rarr;</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>


<div class="section-card">
<h2>Bachelor's Alumni</h2>

<h3>Class of 2024</h3>
<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Aditi Agarwal</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Predoc at <span class="company">Google DeepMind</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Arun Reddy Anugu</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS in Computer Vision (MSCV) at <span class="university">Carnegie Mellon University</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Progyan Das</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Applied Scientist at <span class="company">Microsoft</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Madhav Kanda</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at <span class="university">University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Dhruv Patel</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at Texas A&M University</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Haikoo Khandor</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at Texas A&M University</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Utkarsh Mittal</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at <span class="university">NYU Tandon</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Inderjeet Bhullar</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Data Scientist at <span class="company">Skan.ai</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Kalash Kankariya</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Data Scientist at <span class="company">Skan.ai</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Rahul Chembakasseril</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Data Scientist at <span class="company">Skan.ai</span></div>
</div>
</div>

<h3>Class of 2023</h3>
<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Aadesh Desai</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at <span class="highlight-companies company-cmu">Carnegie Mellon University</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Saagar Parikh</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at <span class="highlight-companies company-cmu">Carnegie Mellon University</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Eshan Gujarathi</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Predoc at <span class="university">IIT Madras</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Hitarth Gandhi</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at <span class="university">UC Irvine</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Gautam Vashishtha</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Data Scientist at <span class="company">Skan.AI</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Xhitij Choudhary</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Data Scientist at <span class="company">Skan.AI</span></div>
</div>
</div>

<h3>Class of 2022</h3>
<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Palak Purohit</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at <span class="university">Caltech</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Hetvi Shastri</div>
<div class="alumni-details">PhD at <span class="university">UMass Amherst</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Chris Francis</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at UC San Diego</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Dhruvi Lodhavia</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at UC San Diego</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Harsh Patel</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at UC San Diego</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Shivam Sahni</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MS at UC San Diego</div>
</div>
</div>

<h3>Class of 2020</h3>
<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Soham Pachpande</div>
<div class="alumni-details"><span class="company">HSBC</span> → MS at <span class="university">UCSD</span> → SWE at <span class="company">Salesforce</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Deepak Narayanan</div>
<div class="alumni-details"><span class="company">Microsoft Research India</span> → MS at <span class="university">ETH Zurich</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Apoorv Agnihotri</div>
<div class="alumni-details"><span class="company">Wadhwani AI</span> → Data Scientist at <span class="startup">Rephrase.ai</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Kukunuri Rithwik</div>
<div class="alumni-details"><span class="company">Jio</span> → ML Scientist at <span class="company">Nykaa</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="section-card">
<h2>Master's Alumni</h2>

<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Poornima Bhatia (2025)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MTech Graduate • Accessibility Research</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Prince Kumar (2025)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MTech Graduate • LLMs & Air Quality</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Shataxi Dubey (2025)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">MTech Graduate • Computer Vision & VLMs</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Ayush Shrivastava (2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">PhD at <span class="university">IIT Gandhinagar</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Suraj Jaiswal (2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Scientist at <span class="startup">Neuroreef Labs</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Ankita Jain (2023)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Member of Technical Staff at <span class="company">Oracle</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Karan Kumar (2020)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Software Engineer at <span class="company">Trading Technologies</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Souvik Roy (2020)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Senior Consultant at <span class="company">eClerx</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="section-card">
<h2>Research Associates & Interns</h2>

<h3>Research Assistants</h3>
<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Tanu Tiwari (2025)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Fellow • Machine Learning & Research Methods</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Meenakshi Prakash (2025)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Fellow • Data Science & Computational Analysis</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Prerna Khanna</div>
<div class="alumni-details">PhD student at <span class="university">Stony Brook University</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Tanmay Srivastava</div>
<div class="alumni-details">PhD student at <span class="university">Stony Brook University</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Kaushal Modi</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Data Scientist at <span class="company">InfiBeam</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Rohit Patil</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Software Engineer at <span class="company">Publicis Sapient</span></div>
</div>
</div>

<h3>Visiting Interns</h3>
<div class="alumni-list">
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Vibhuti Bansal (Summer 2022)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Software Engineer at <span class="startup">CRED</span></div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Devodita Chakravarty (Summer 2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Winner of Bhalodia-Khetan Excellence Award</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Ami Ashish Buch (Summer 2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Intern</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Sajay Raj (Summer 2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Intern</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Muhammad Zaid Hassan (Summer 2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Intern</div>
</div>
<div class="alumni-item">
<div class="alumni-name">Omisha Guha (Summer 2024)</div>
<div class="alumni-details">Research Intern</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 40px 0; padding: 30px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;">
<h3 style="color: #c44536; margin-bottom: 16px;">Ready to Join This Amazing Network?</h3>
<p style="color: #5a6070; margin-bottom: 20px;">Start your journey with us and become part of a community that's making global impact</p>
<a href="openings.qmd" style="background: #c44536; color: white; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; margin-right: 10px;">View Open Positions</a>
<a href="experiences.qmd" style="background: transparent; color: #c44536; border: 2px solid #c44536; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;">Read Alumni Stories</a>
</div>
